name: Artichoke Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the artichoke hearts into small bits.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Place the mixed ingredients and torn artichoke pieces onto a baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
